message.name: UWB_RANGING
message.description: Message used to stream ranging results. Contains up to 15 measurements.
message.field: Base time for measurements, milliseconds elapsed since ranging start.
System ID of the first device for every measurement.
System ID of the second device for every measurement.
Relative offset for a measurement to the base_time, in milliseconds.

message.name: UWB_RANGING_PACKED
message.description: Message used to stream ranging results. Contains up to 15 measurements.
message.field: Base time for measurements, milliseconds elapsed since ranging start.
Sequence of 6 byte elements, repeated for every measurement: [time_offset_ms, device_a, device_b, distance_cm, distance_cm >> 8, distance_cm >> 16]. Sequence end is marked by device_a == 0.

message.name: UWB_RANGING_DEBUG
message.description: Message used to stream ranging results. Contains up to 15 measurements.
message.field: Base time for measurements, milliseconds elapsed since ranging start.

Sequence of 11 byte elements, repeated for every measurement: [time_offset_ms, device_a, device_b, distance_cm, distance_cm >> 8, distance_cm >> 16, ppb_difference, ppb_difference >> 8, velocity_cm, velocity_cm >> 8, nlos_avg]. Sequence end is marked by device_a == 0.
